title: Japanese-Style Stir-Fried Chicken and Citrusy Vegetables
description: A quick and flavorful stir-fry recipe that combines juicy chicken with crunchy vegetables, all cooked to perfection in a savory Japanese-inspired sauce.
instructions: 1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
3. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
4. Add the bell pepper, carrots, and zucchini to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender-crisp, about 4-5 minutes.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together the citrusy sauce, soy sauce, and chickpea flour.
6. Pour the sauce into the skillet and stir to coat the vegetables.
7. Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
8. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce is bubbly and slightly thickened.
9. Garnish with green onions and serve hot.
